title: Add diagram naming, selection interface, clear button, PNG export, fix transform tool, and remove bidirectional arrow

requirements.summary: Add diagram naming functionality when saving attack path diagrams
acceptanceCriteria: When the save button is clicked, a dialog or input prompt appears requesting a diagram name
The diagram name is stored with the diagram state when saved to the backend
Users cannot save without providing a name

file_operations.description: Create a new dialog component that prompts users to enter a diagram name before saving. Include a text input field for the name, validation to prevent empty names, and save/cancel buttons. Use shadcn/ui Dialog and Input components for consistent styling.

Replace the direct save operation with the SaveDiagramDialog component. When the save button is clicked, open the dialog and pass the diagram state. Only trigger the saveDiagramState mutation after the user provides a valid name in the dialog.
Update the mutation to accept a diagram name parameter and pass it to the backend's saveDiagramState method alongside the diagram state.

requirements.summary: Implement diagram selection interface in the load functionality
acceptanceCriteria: The LoadDiagramDialog component displays a list of saved diagrams with their names
Users can select a specific diagram from the list to load
The selected diagram's complete state is restored to the canvas

file_operations.description: Create a React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams using the backend's getAllDiagrams method, returning an array of NamedDiagram objects with diagram IDs, names, and state.

Replace the current diagram loading logic with a list-based selection interface. Use the useGetAllDiagrams hook to fetch all saved diagrams and display them in a scrollable list with diagram names. Add click handlers to select and load a specific diagram by its ID. Show loading and error states appropriately.
Update the LoadDiagramDialog usage to handle the new selection-based loading flow. Ensure the selected diagram's state is properly converted and applied to the canvas state.

requirements.summary: Add a clear button to the attack path visualizer toolbar
acceptanceCriteria: A clear button is visible in the AttackPathToolbar component
Clicking the clear button removes all placed icons, connections, drawings, and text labels from the canvas
The canvas returns to an empty state after clearing

file_operations.description: Add a clearCanvas function to the hook that resets all state arrays (placedIcons, connections, freehandDrawings, lines, textLabels) to empty arrays and clears the undo history.

Add a clear button to the toolbar with an appropriate icon (e.g., trash or X). Position it near the other file operation buttons (save, load, export). Wire it to call the clearCanvas function from useAttackPathState when clicked.
Pass the clearCanvas function from useAttackPathState to the AttackPathToolbar component as a prop.

requirements.summary: Replace JPEG export with PNG export functionality
acceptanceCriteria: The export button in the toolbar triggers PNG export instead of JPEG
The exported PNG file contains all canvas elements including icons, connections, drawings, and text labels
The PNG file is downloaded with an appropriate filename

file_operations.description: Update the export functionality to generate PNG instead of JPEG. Modify the canvas toBlob or toDataURL call to use 'image/png' format. Update the downloaded filename to use .png extension instead of .jpeg.

requirements.summary: Fix the free transform tool to properly move and resize icons and text labels
acceptanceCriteria: The free transform tool successfully moves icons when dragged
The free transform tool successfully moves text labels when dragged
The free transform tool resizes icons using transformation handles
The free transform tool resizes text labels using transformation handles
Transformations persist correctly in the canvas state

file_operations.description: Fix the free transform tool's event handlers for dragging and resizing. Ensure mouse down, move, and up events properly update the position and size of both icons and text labels. Add proper bounds checking and state updates to persist transformations. Fix any issues with the transformation handles not responding correctly.

Review and fix the state update logic for icon and text label transformations. Ensure the updateIconPosition, updateIconSize, updateTextLabelPosition, and updateTextLabelSize functions (or equivalent) correctly update the state and trigger re-renders.

requirements.summary: Remove the bidirectional arrow icon from the toolbar
acceptanceCriteria: The bidirectional arrow icon is not visible in the AttackPathToolbar
Users cannot place bidirectional arrow icons on the canvas
The icon type is removed from the AttackPathIcon component's supported types

file_operations.description: Remove the bidirectional arrow icon from the icon options array in the toolbar. Filter out any references to 'bidirectional-arrow' icon type.
Remove the 'bidirectional-arrow' case from the icon type rendering logic. Remove any SVG or component code related to rendering bidirectional arrows.
